style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;">standard deviation</span></font><div><font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></font></div><div><font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;">T = mean(d) + K * std(d)</span></font></div><div><font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;">K defaults to 3</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="240" x="240" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mddx4RxBcTWjfTDE7u_Q-10" id="mddx4RxBcTWjfTDE7u_Q-3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;">percentile</span></font><br><div><font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></font></div><div><font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;">T = 95th percentile of all d_i</span></font></div><div><font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;">(default)</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="240" x="-50" y="220" id="mddx4RxBcTWjfTDE7u_Q-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;">interquantile</span></font><br><div><font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><br></span></font></div><div><font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;">T = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR</span></font></div><div><font face="Comic Sans MS"><span style="font-size: 15px;">(robust to outliers)</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="240" x="530" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mddx4RxBcTWjfTDE7u_Q-6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px;" style="font-size: 22px;">Breakpoint Types</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="190" x="265" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
